user_message: Working on Lucerne Publishing's consumption trend -- need you to pull the context.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-27 15:08 EST
Subject: Re: Re: consumption trend Timeline

Just checking in on the consumption trend proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
Date: 2024-02-27 16:56 EST
Subject: consumption trend - Action Required

There's been a change in our timeline for consumption trend. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-23 17:26 EST
Subject: consumption trend - Action Required

Just checking in on the consumption trend proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF16-A trap (Mismatches tone (formal where casual was established)); produces complete Thread summary, key commitments/asks identified, waiting-on-whom assessment, draft response matching
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF16-A failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF16-A failure mode (Mismatches tone (formal where casual was established))
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF16-A -- Mismatches tone (formal where casual was established)
